nodes.name: Gymnoris
nodes.summary: Gymnoris（Gymnoris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Yellow-throated bush sparrow、Sahel bush sparrow、Yellow-spotted bush sparrow等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-spotted bush sparrow
nodes.summary: The yellow-spotted bush sparrow or yellow-spotted petronia (Gymnoris pyrgita) is a species of bird in the sparrow family, Passeridae. It is common throughout the Sahel and the Horn of Africa. Its natural habitats are dry savannah and subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland. References
